## Pre-submission Checklist

- [ ] Ran `bash build_mdbook_v2.sh` locally — build passes with no errors
- [ ] New figures are placed under `img/ch<chapter-number>/` with kebab-case filenames
- [ ] New bibliography entries are added to `mlsys.bib` and cited with `:cite:` syntax
- [ ] Formulas use correct `:eqlabel:` / `:eqref:` syntax
- [ ] Figures use correct `:label:` / `:numref:` syntax
- [ ] If modifying English content, considered whether the corresponding Chinese chapter (`v2/zh_chapters/`) needs updating
- [ ] `SUMMARY.md` was NOT manually edited (it is auto-generated by the build script)
